exercises.prompt: Match: milli, micro, kilo, mega, giga to 10Ві, 10вЃ¶, 10вЃ»Ві, 10вЃ»вЃ¶, 10вЃ№
exercises.solution: milli=10вЃ»Ві, micro=10вЃ»вЃ¶, kilo=10Ві, mega=10вЃ¶, giga=10вЃ№. Then: 5 km=5000 m, 20 mm=0.02 m, 3 Ојs=0.000003 s, 2 GB=2,000,000,000 bytes. Prefixes scale the units!

exercises.prompt: Write as numbers: 5 km = ? m, 20 mm = ? m, 3 Ојs = ? s, 2 GB = ? bytes
exercises.solution: milli=10вЃ»Ві, micro=10вЃ»вЃ¶, kilo=10Ві, mega=10вЃ¶, giga=10вЃ№. Then: 5 km=5000 m, 20 mm=0.02 m, 3 Ојs=0.000003 s, 2 GB=2,000,000,000 bytes. Prefixes scale the units!
